audit_items.proof_trace: Property enforced via defense-in-depth: (1) SSZ type system hard cap at 4096 (ContiguousList<KzgCommitment, U4096>) rejects oversized blocks during deserialization, (2) Runtime validation at L186-194 checks blob_kzg_commitments.len() <= config.get_blob_schedule_entry(epoch).max_blobs_per_block on all processing paths (gossip + full state transition).
